summary: Phase 4 - Settings & Configuration Deep Audit COMPLETE (Regression Test Post-Restart). All 14 settings modules verified successfully (100% success rate). Each module renders correctly with expected content. Organization Settings with all 6 tabs (General, Team, Operations, Finance, EFI, Integrations) verified - all clickable and load content correctly.

minor.issue: Console shows 500 errors on /data-management page, but page renders correctly
Console shows 403 errors on /data-migration page, but page renders correctly

issues: Chart width/height warning in console - chart components have dimension issues when container is -1. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: IMPORTANT: Settings routes use ROOT-LEVEL paths, not /settings/* prefixed paths.
Console warning about chart dimensions should be addressed in dashboard components for better user experience

success_rate.frontend: 100% (20/20 items tested - 14 settings pages + 6 org tabs)

Organization Settings tabs (General, Team, Operations, Finance, EFI, Integrations) all work correctly.
